targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(duration) as total
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
                                AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
                                AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
                                AND employment_type IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
                                AND (
                                    ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
                                    OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
                                    OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
                                )

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_name) as total
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
                                AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
                                AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
                                AND employment_type IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
                                AND (
                                    ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
                                    OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
                                    OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
                                )
                                AND employee_name IS NOT NULL

SELECT ROUND(AVG(week_hours)::numeric, 2) as avg
                            FROM (
                                SELECT
                                    EXTRACT(WEEK FROM work_date) as week,
                                    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) as year,
                                    SUM(duration) as week_hours
                                FROM work_logs
                                WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                    AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                    AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
                                    AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
                                    AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring}) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
                                GROUP BY EXTRACT(WEEK FROM work_date), EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)
                            ) sub

SELECT
                                'Week ' || to_char(work_date, 'IW') as "Week",
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2023 THEN employee_name END) as "2023",
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2024 THEN employee_name END) as "2024",
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2025 THEN employee_name END) as "2025",
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2026 THEN employee_name END) as "2026"
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
                                AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
                                AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
                                AND employment_type IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
                                AND (
                                    ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
                                    OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
                                    OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
                                )
                            GROUP BY 1
                            ORDER BY 1

SELECT
                                'Week ' || to_char(work_date, 'IW') as "Week",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2023 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2023",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2024 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2024",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2025 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2025",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2026 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2026"
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
                                AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
                                AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
                                AND employment_type IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
                                AND (
                                    ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
                                    OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
                                    OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
                                )
                            GROUP BY 1
                            ORDER BY 1

SELECT
                                TO_CHAR(work_date, 'Mon') as "Month",
                                EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date) as month_num,
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2023 THEN employee_name END) as "2023",
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2024 THEN employee_name END) as "2024",
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2025 THEN employee_name END) as "2025",
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2026 THEN employee_name END) as "2026"
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
                                AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
                                AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
                                AND employment_type IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
                                AND (
                                    ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
                                    OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
                                    OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
                                )
                            GROUP BY TO_CHAR(work_date, 'Mon'), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date)
                            ORDER BY month_num

SELECT
                                TO_CHAR(work_date, 'Mon') as "Month",
                                EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date) as month_num,
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2023 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2023",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2024 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2024",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2025 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2025",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2026 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2026"
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
                                AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
                                AND employee_name IN (${employee:sqlstring})
                                AND employment_type IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}) AND to_char(work_date, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring})
                                AND (
                                    ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
                                    OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
                                    OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
                                )
                            GROUP BY TO_CHAR(work_date, 'Mon'), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date)
                            ORDER BY month_num

list.label: Year
list.name: year
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date)::text FROM work_logs ORDER BY 1 DESC

list.label: Week
list.name: week
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT to_char(work_date, 'IW') FROM work_logs ORDER BY 1 ASC

list.label: Department
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT department FROM work_logs WHERE department IS NOT NULL ORDER BY department

list.label: Activity
list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT activity_type FROM work_logs WHERE activity_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY activity_type

list.label: Employee
list.name: employee
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT employee_name FROM work_logs WHERE employee_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY employee_name
